title: Darkspace
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Darkspace''' was what the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] called [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Instead of [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], they used [[dovin basal]]s to pull a vessel from one location to another. Despite their advanced biotechnology, the Yuuzhan Vong suffered the same hyperspace limitations as hyperdrives. They could be pulled from darkspace by the [[Mass shadow/Legends|mass shadows]] of objects in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]], and required the use of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] to travel safely through darkspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
